title: [SYCL] add OP GATED_DELTA_NET to enhance to support Qwen3.5-9B-Claude-4.6-Opus-Reasoning-Distilled-GGUF
body:
Fix issue: https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/issues/20423
Add OP GATED_DELTA_NET.
All UT cases are passed.
Update the ops.md.
All OPs run on GPU.

Here is the performance result:

|GPU|PP(t/s)|tg(t/s)|
|-|-|-|
|Arc770| 90.83 -> 339.22|10.52 -> 11.73|
|iGPU (UHD Graphics 770)| 26.21 -> 33.42| 2.12 -> 2.24|
